item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first post. I am testing the Hugo framework and the PaperMod theme, as well as getting familiar with the setup (mostly code highlighting, markdown formatting, and equations 😆).

In this very first post (on the website built on graduation from high school), I will share an interesting problem that underlies an AP Computer Science A question my friend asked me during my senior year in high school.

True or false: will i sometimes equal 3?

item.title: Privacy Policy and Content Usage Notice
item.description:
Last updated: June 2026

Privacy

This website is a personal blog.

I do not intentionally collect personal information from visitors except information voluntarily provided through email, contact forms, comments, or other direct communication channels.

Like most websites, hosting providers and analytics services may automatically collect limited technical information such as IP addresses, browser types, operating systems, referring pages, and access times for security, maintenance, and performance purposes.

I do not sell personal information to third parties.
